sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from "react";
import {
  Button,
  TextField,
  Typography,
  Box,
  Grid,
  Paper,
  IconButton,
} from "@mui/material";
import PhotoCamera from "@mui/icons-material/PhotoCamera";
import UploadFileIcon from "@mui/icons-material/UploadFile";

export default function DocumentUpload() {
  const [docs, setDocs] = useState({
    licenseNumber: "",
    rcNumber: "",
    insuranceNumber: "",
    aadharNumber: "",
    licenseImage: null,
    rcImage: null,
    insuranceImage: null,
    aadharFront: null,
    aadharBack: null,
  });

  const handleFileChange = (e, field) => {
    setDocs({ ...docs, [field]: e.target.files[0] });
  };

  const handleInputChange = (e) => {
    setDocs({ ...docs, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
  };

  const handleSubmit = () => {
    console.log("📌 Submitting documents:", docs);
  };

  return (
    <Box sx={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "center", mt: 6 }}>
      <Paper
        elevation={3}
        sx={{ p: 4, width: "95%", maxWidth: 1000, borderRadius: 3 }}
      >
        <Typography
          variant="h4"
          sx={{ fontWeight: "bold", mb: 4, textAlign: "center" }}
        >
          Upload Documents
        </Typography>

        <Grid container spacing={3}>
          {/* Left stack - Input fields */}
          <Grid item xs={12} md={6}>
            <Box sx={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 3 }}>
              <TextField
                fullWidth
                label="License Number"
                name="licenseNumber"
                value={docs.licenseNumber}
                onChange={handleInputChange}
              />
              <TextField
                fullWidth
                label="RC Number"
                name="rcNumber"
                value={docs.rcNumber}
                onChange={handleInputChange}
              />
              <TextField
                fullWidth
                label="Insurance Policy Number"
                name="insuranceNumber"
                value={docs.insuranceNumber}
                onChange={handleInputChange}
              />
              <TextField
                fullWidth
                label="Aadhar Number"
                name="aadharNumber"
                value={docs.aadharNumber}
                onChange={handleInputChange}
              />
            </Box>
          </Grid>

          {/* Right stack - Upload boxes */}
          <Grid item xs={12} md={6}>
            <Box sx={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 3 }}>
              {/* License Image */}
              <Box sx={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 2 }}>
                <Typography sx={{ minWidth: 120 }}>License Image</Typography>
                <Button
                  variant="outlined"
                  component="label"
                  startIcon={<UploadFileIcon />}
                >
                  Upload
                  <input
                    hidden
                    type="file"
                    accept="image/*"
                    onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, "licenseImage")}
                  />
                </Button>
                <IconButton component="label" color="primary">
                  <PhotoCamera />
                  <input
                    hidden
                    type="file"
                    accept="image/*"
                    capture="environment"
                    onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, "licenseImage")}
                  />
                </IconButton>
                {docs.licenseImage && (
                  <Typography variant="body2">{docs.licenseImage.name}</Typography>
                )}
              </Box>

              {/* RC Image */}
              <Box sx={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 2 }}>
                <Typography sx={{ minWidth: 120 }}>RC Image</Typography>
                <Button
                  variant="outlined"
                  component="label"
                  startIcon={<UploadFileIcon />}
                >
                  Upload
                  <input
                    hidden
                    type="file"
                    accept="image/*"
                    onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, "rcImage")}
                  />
                </Button>
                <IconButton component="label" color="primary">
                  <PhotoCamera />
                  <input
                    hidden
                    type="file"
                    accept="image/*"
                    capture="environment"
                    onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, "rcImage")}
                  />
                </IconButton>
                {docs.rcImage && (
                  <Typography variant="body2">{docs.rcImage.name}</Typography>
                )}
              </Box>

              {/* Insurance Image */}
              <Box sx={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 2 }}>
                <Typography sx={{ minWidth: 120 }}>Insurance Image</Typography>
                <Button
                  variant="outlined"
                  component="label"
                  startIcon={<UploadFileIcon />}
                >
                  Upload
                  <input
                    hidden
                    type="file"
                    accept="image/*"
                    onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, "insuranceImage")}
                  />
                </Button>
                <IconButton component="label" color="primary">
                  <PhotoCamera />
                  <input
                    hidden
                    type="file"
                    accept="image/*"
                    capture="environment"
                    onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, "insuranceImage")}
                  />
                </IconButton>
                {docs.insuranceImage && (
                  <Typography variant="body2">{docs.insuranceImage.name}</Typography>
                )}
              </Box>

              {/* Aadhar Front */}
              <Box sx={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 2 }}>
                <Typography sx={{ minWidth: 120 }}>Aadhar Front</Typography>
                <Button
                  variant="outlined"
                  component="label"
                  startIcon={<UploadFileIcon />}
                >
                  Upload
                  <input
                    hidden
                    type="file"
                    accept="image/*"
                    onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, "aadharFront")}
                  />
                </Button>
                <IconButton component="label" color="primary">
                  <PhotoCamera />
                  <input
                    hidden
                    type="file"
                    accept="image/*"
                    capture="environment"
                    onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, "aadharFront")}
                  />
                </IconButton>
                {docs.aadharFront && (
                  <Typography variant="body2">{docs.aadharFront.name}</Typography>
                )}
              </Box>

              {/* Aadhar Back */}
              <Box sx={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 2 }}>
                <Typography sx={{ minWidth: 120 }}>Aadhar Back</Typography>
                <Button
                  variant="outlined"
                  component="label"
                  startIcon={<UploadFileIcon />}
                >
                  Upload
                  <input
                    hidden
                    type="file"
                    accept="image/*"
                    onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, "aadharBack")}
                  />
                </Button>
                <IconButton component="label" color="primary">
                  <PhotoCamera />
                  <input
                    hidden
                    type="file"
                    accept="image/*"
                    capture="environment"
                    onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, "aadharBack")}
                  />
                </IconButton>
                {docs.aadharBack && (
                  <Typography variant="body2">{docs.aadharBack.name}</Typography>
                )}
              </Box>
            </Box>
          </Grid>
        </Grid>

        {/* Submit button */}
        <Box sx={{ mt: 4, textAlign: "center" }}>
          <Button
            variant="contained"
            sx={{ bgcolor: "black", color: "white", px: 4, py: 1.5 }}
            onClick={handleSubmit}
          >
            Submit Documents
          </Button>
        </Box>
      </Paper>
    </Box>
  );
}
